name: @mosaic/web-connector
description: Browser wallet connectivity for Mosaic root wallets: Xaman (payload QR + status wss), EVM (WalletConnect QR to MetaMask mobile by default, EIP-6963 extensions as fallback), Stellar (WalletConnect QR to Freighter mobile by default, Freighter extension as fallback), behind one RootWalletConnector interface. Browser-only; the MCP server must never depend on this package.
